chunks.text: JUDGMENT SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Jail Appeal.No.D-22 of 2020 (Manzoor Brohi Vs. The State) ______________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE _______________________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. Mr. Justice Arbab Ali Hakro. For hearing of main case. 18.04.2023 Mr. Ahsan Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for the appellant. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. = * = * = * = * = * = It is stated by learned counsel for the appellant that the appellant has been convicted and sentenced by learned trial Court in absentia; therefore, he would not press the disposal of instant criminal jail appeal on merit, provided the learned trial Court is directed to conduct regular trial against the appellant in accordance with law, which is not opposed by learned Addl.P.G for the State. In view of above, the impugned judgment only to the extent of the appellant is set aside with direction to learned trial Court to proceed with his case afresh in accordance with law to meet with the requirement of the fair trial, as is prescribed by Article 10-A of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. The instant criminal jail appeal is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
